description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure dressed in a classic Victorian-inspired outfit, featuring a knee-length dress with puffed sleeves and a fitted bodice, overlaid by a prominent apron tied in a large bow at the back. The dress has a checkered pattern on the sleeves and bodice, while the apron is plain with decorative trim. The figure has long, straight hair parted to one side, and her facial features are sharp and slightly exaggerated, giving her a distinct, almost gothic appearance. She wears knee-high socks and simple, rounded-toe shoes. The overall look is reminiscent of a character from a dark fairy tale or period drama, with a somber and reserved demeanor. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral, T-pose stance.
description: A stylized adult female in a Victorian-inspired dress with apron, long straight hair, and knee-high socks, posed with arms outstretched. The figure has a gothic, storybook appearance and detailed period clothing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full dress, apron, facial features, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the bow at the back of the apron, and the layered skirt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large apron bow, the back of the dress, and the straight fall of the hair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, apron bow, and shoe details.
attribute_clothing_type: Victorian-inspired dress with puffed sleeves, fitted bodice, knee-length skirt, and a large tied apron
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair with side part
